case_title: HOME SAVINGS OF AMERICA A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK vs. MONYE, DELORES et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID R. MEDLIN FILD FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOME SAVINGS OF AMERICA A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOME SAVINGS OF AMERICA A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONYE, DELORES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 869 HAYES ST, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT TO ISSUE TO INCLUDE ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES. EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MONYE, DELORES
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOME SAVINGS OF AMERICA A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MONYE, DELORES DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $44.10 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOME SAVINGS OF AMERICA A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK
